# FFERR_UNPLUGGED | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Force Feedback ](/documentation/forcefeedback)

- [ FFERR_UNPLUGGED ](/documentation/forcefeedback/fferr_unplugged)

-  FFERR_UNPLUGGED 

Global Variable# FFERR_UNPLUGGED

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.2+

```
var FFERR_UNPLUGGED: Int { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/forcefeedback/fferr_unplugged#Discussion)

The operation could not be completed because the device is not plugged in.
